title: Behavioral Psychology
tagline: From a lockdown certification to three published papers — cognitive decision-making, nutritional psychology, and consumer behavior
summary: A three-year research arc that started with Yale and Wesleyan psychology certifications during COVID, got a hard push from the Domino's data breach, and ended with three published papers: cognitive decision-making (Springer IACC 2021), nutritional psychology with 98% ML accuracy (Springer ICEI 2022), and online consumer behavior under the Internet of Behaviors framework (CRC Press 2023).
